key_items: Standard Chartered calls crypto bottom with cycle low likely in; Bitcoin nears $65K on Trump Iran peace deal pledge reopening Strait of Hormuz liquidity
Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows resume after 5-day outflow streak; institutional adoption accelerates with SpaceX joining top 10 holders and banks building Bitcoin vaults
Geopolitical de-escalation (Iran peace deal) combined with positive macro catalysts (CFTC digital commodities guidance, Coinbase derivatives expansion, Blockworks-Messari consolidation)
reasoning: Multiple bullish catalysts converge: major institutional validation (Standard Chartered bottom call, SpaceX Bitcoin holdings, BNY vault announcement), geopolitical risk reduction (Iran peace deal reopening trade routes), and regulatory clarity (CFTC no-action letter, SEC tokenization pathway). ETF flows have stabilized after weakness, suggesting institutional accumulation into $65K resistance.
risks: Iran peace deal announcement contradicted by Tehran creates execution risk; if negotiations fail or escalate, risk-on asset flows could reverse sharply, breaking $64K support within 24-48 hours.
